summary:
\boxed{Mast cells are present in normal dental pulp and continue to be found even during inflammatory processes.}

The summary captures the essential point about mast cell location within pulpal tissues across different physiological statuses while adhering strictly to a two-sentence format focused directly on answering whether these immune-related cells remain constant features regardless of disease state.
